content:
Lyrics:
[Verse]
City sleeps sound
Sirens scream now
I wish I could sleep
I wish I knew how

[Prechorus]
My head is a mess
A glorious stress

[Chorus]
Bomp bomp bomp
I think I broke something
Bomp bomp bomp
Malfunction Junction

[Verse 2]
Gears grind slow
No place to go
But I gotta move
Prove I'm still in the groove

[Prechorus]
My head is a mess
A glorious stress

[Chorus]
Bomp bomp bomp
I think I broke something
Bomp bomp bomp
Malfunction Junction
tags: Music track: Malfunction Junction by Artist
